summary: Executed backend and frontend validation for lead-assignment Sprint 1 scope against configured public URL; environment points to a different app so requested flows are unreachable.

critical.issue: Returns 404 on configured public URL; endpoint not routed in deployed app.
Returns 404 on configured public URL; cannot validate event listing.
Returns 404 on configured public URL; assignment workflow cannot be tested.
Returns 404 on configured public URL; provider notification test not reachable.
Returns 404 on configured public URL; Gupshup connection creation not testable.

ui_bugs.issue: Loaded app is 'Emergent | Fullstack App' placeholder, not WhatCEM UI; /settings/lead-assignment flow cannot be exercised.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend and backend under test are not the deployed target on provided URL, causing full integration mismatch.

action_items: Provide/restore correct public URL for WhatCEM deployment (current REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL points to another app).
Provide valid authenticated test credentials in /app/memory/test_credentials.md (currently empty).
After URL+credentials are fixed, retest all requested backend endpoints and frontend flows.
Add data-testid to settings channel cards (including WhatsApp Gupshup card) to improve UI automation reliability.
critical_code_review_comments: client/src/App.tsx calls initializeGoogleTranslateCompatibility() twice in the same useEffect; redundant duplicate side-effect should be removed.
settings channel connection cards are clickable but many lack data-testid attributes, reducing testability and violating current testing contract.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL in /app/frontend/.env currently serves a different placeholder app. Start by validating deployment URL mapping for WhatCEM, then re-run backend pytest and Playwright flows with authenticated session.
rca of the issue: Root cause appears to be environment/deployment mismatch: configured public URL is not pointing to WhatCEM service. Reproduction: open URL and check title ('Emergent | Fullstack App') and call /api/lead-assignment/* -> 404. Mitigation: update frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL or ingress mapping to correct WhatCEM deployment before feature validation.
